productDisplayName: Rockport Men Drsp Slip On Black Formal Shoes
description: Slip into laidback comfort with these Slipon shoes. Coming from rockport, these shoes feature uppers crafted from rich leather with stitch detailing for extra style. Engineered with adidas AdiPRENE technology, this shoe offers all-day cushioning comfort making it a great buy. Upper Full-grain leather upper for added strength and durability Padded tongue and collar to protect from excessive rubbing and prevent blistering Elasticated inserts on the sides of the tongue for easy insertion and removal of the feet Textile lining for greater comfort Brand logo embedded behind the collar Midsole Highly shock-absorbent adiPRENE technology infused cushioning protects the heel on impact for all day cushioned comfort Polyurethane (PU) Midsole Offers durability for long-term wear & shock absorbent-cushioning to help reduce foot fatigue Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole delivers shock absorption thereby reducing foot fatigue truWALK Architecute on the outsole for better comfort Flex grooves provide flexibility in foot movement Shoe care Use a leather brush to dust off the dirt Use a leather shoe polish to make the shoes shine Do not store in direct sunlight
